goals.subtitle: Manage your goals in Supabase. Free plan supports up to 2 goals.
goals.empty: No goals yet. Create one to get started.
goals.name: Name
goals.namePlaceholder: e.g. Down payment / Japan trip / Insurance
goals.errorGoalLimit: Free plan supports up to 2 goals. Upgrade to Plus for unlimited goals.
goals.errorInvalidInput: Please check your input. Name/type are required and target amount must be greater than 0.
goals.fundPoolSubtitle: Set a hard savings ratio, then allocate the remaining monthly net across your goals.
goals.fundPoolBalanceHint: Manually set starting point for projections (not an automatically calculated account balance).
goals.fundPoolSavingsRateHint: From this month's net: savings = net × rate.
goals.fundPoolOverLimit: Over limit by {n}%. Lower hard savings or goal allocations so the total stays within 100%.
goals.fundPoolNoGoals: Create a goal first to allocate.
goals.dreamTheaterSubtitle: Generate a vivid dream story from your goal and keywords.

transactions.title: Record Transaction
transactions.subtitle: Log entries manually, or use receipt screenshots/voice to pre-fill bulk rows via AI (daily limit: {scanLimit}/{voiceLimit}). Quick record is also available. You can also create recurring bills.
transactions.fxPreviewEmpty: Enter an amount to preview conversion
transactions.bulkSubtitle: Add multiple entries across different dates in one go.
transactions.bulkClientInvalid: Check each row: valid date, amount > 0, category is required.
transactions.empty: No entries yet. Add one to get started.
transactions.successRecurringCreated: Recurring bill saved. We'll auto-generate entries on due dates.
transactions.errorInvalid: Enter a valid amount greater than 0 and a category.
transactions.errorRecurringUnavailable: Recurring bills are unavailable: database schema is not initialized. Please apply the latest schema.sql in Supabase.
transactions.errorRecurringForbidden: Failed to save recurring bill: insufficient permissions (RLS). Please ensure recurring_bills policies are applied.
transactions.errorRecurringProfileMissing: Failed to save recurring bill: profile row is missing. Ensure profiles is initialized for this user.
transactions.errorRecurringFailed: Failed to save recurring bill. Please try again.
transactions.scanErrorUnauthenticated: Sign in to use receipt scanning.
transactions.scanErrorRateLimit: Daily scan limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
transactions.scanErrorRateLimitDetail: Daily scan limit reached (0 remaining / {n} limit). Try again tomorrow.
transactions.scanErrorTooLarge: Image is too large. Please keep it under 4MB (crop or compress and try again).
transactions.scanErrorUnsupportedType: Unsupported image type. Please use JPG/PNG/WebP/GIF.
transactions.scanErrorBadFile: Invalid file or failed to read. Please try another image.
transactions.scanErrorUnrecognized: Could not read a valid amount. Tip: include the total/paid amount, avoid blur/glare, or enter it manually.
transactions.scanErrorService: Scanning is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
transactions.voiceErrorUnsupported: Recording is not supported in this browser. Try Chrome/Edge or update your browser.
transactions.voiceErrorMic: Unable to access microphone. Please check browser permissions.
transactions.voiceErrorTooLarge: Audio is too large. Please keep it under 6MB (record a shorter clip).
transactions.voiceErrorUnsupportedType: Unsupported audio type. Please use WebM/OGG/WAV/MP3/MP4/M4A.
transactions.voiceErrorBadFile: Invalid audio file or failed to read. Please try recording again.
transactions.voiceErrorRateLimit: Daily voice limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
transactions.voiceErrorRateLimitDetail: Daily voice limit reached (0 remaining / {n} limit). Try again tomorrow.
transactions.voiceErrorUnrecognized: Could not parse any amount. Tip: say amounts clearly, e.g. “breakfast 20, metro 3, coffee 18”, or enter manually.
transactions.aiPrivacyHint: Privacy: images/audio are uploaded to the recognition service (DMXAPI/OpenAI) to generate structured results.
transactions.recurringManageSubtitle: Manage fixed expenses/income. We'll auto-generate entries on due dates.
transactions.recurringEmpty: No recurring bills yet. Create one from the Transactions form.
transactions.recurringUsesAbove: Recurring bills use the amount, category, and note you entered above.

aiAssistantPage.subtitle: Coming soon: bilingual AI chat, budget suggestions, and conflict hints.

reportsPage.subtitle: Monthly view, category mix, and a multi-month trend.
reportsPage.baseNote: All figures are in USD (base). Multi-currency rows use the stored base amount when available.
reportsPage.emptyMonth: No transactions for this month yet.
reportsPage.trendFromHistory: The trend section below lists each month in your selected window—even when the selected month has no new entries.

transactionsImport.title: Import transactions (CSV)
transactionsImport.subtitle: Import via the generic CSV template. Max 200 rows per import.
transactionsImport.supabaseMissing: Supabase is not configured. Import is unavailable.

quickRecord.title: AI quick record
quickRecord.pageSubtitle: Share, pick, or use iOS Shortcuts + clipboard; AI fills the form—confirm to save.
quickRecord.subtitle: Pay → capture → confirm. Fast path for small purchases.
quickRecord.hintQuota: Uses the same daily limit as receipt scan: {remaining} left today (max {n} per day).
quickRecord.aiPrivacyHint: Privacy: images are uploaded to the recognition service (DMXAPI/OpenAI) to generate structured results.
quickRecord.dropHint: You can also paste an image (supported in some browsers).
quickRecord.pasteFallbackHint: Fallback: after screenshot, switch to this page and paste (long-press or Cmd+V on a keyboard).
quickRecord.iosOfficialBody: A PWA cannot offer a system-wide floating button. With a one-time Shortcut, you can copy the latest screenshot and open this app with ?autoPaste=1 to auto-read the clipboard—fewer steps than open app → choose image → pick from Photos.
quickRecord.iosStep1: In Shortcuts: copy the latest screenshot to the clipboard (or ensure the screenshot is already copied).
quickRecord.iosStep2: Open this URL in Safari (automate with “After screenshot” if you like): {url}
quickRecord.iosStep3: With autoPaste=1 we try to read the clipboard automatically; if blocked, tap the button below or paste manually.
quickRecord.iosShortcutPlaceholder: Publish your Shortcut and set NEXT_PUBLIC_IOS_SHORTCUTS_URL to its iCloud link.
quickRecord.androidOfficialBadge: Android (recommended): Share to the installed PWA
quickRecord.androidOfficialBody: Install the PWA, then share the payment screenshot to this app via the system share sheet—no need to open the gallery picker first.
quickRecord.autoPasteNeedTap: The browser blocked automatic clipboard access (common on iOS). Tap the button after your screenshot is copied.
quickRecord.autoPasteEmpty: No image in the clipboard. Take a screenshot or copy it first, then try again.

calendar.subtitle: Use the monthly calendar to spot missing days. Click a day to backfill.
calendar.supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase env vars are not configured. Please set `.env.local`.

settingsPage.intro: Membership, language, and export settings will land here.
settingsPage.quickRecordBody: Install the app to your home screen. On Android Chrome, share a payment screenshot from Photos to this app. You can also drag, pick, or paste an image on the quick record page. iOS: Add to Home Screen in Safari; sharing varies by version.
settingsPage.installPwaHint: Use “Add to Home screen” / “Install app” so the PWA can receive shares. The English UI uses manifest.en.webmanifest (share target → /en/share-target); the Chinese UI uses manifest.webmanifest (→ /zh/share-target). Re-install after switching language if needed.
settingsPage.iosPitch: On iPhone/iPad, prefer the official “Shortcuts + clipboard” flow on the quick record page—after a one-time setup it’s much faster than only using the gallery picker.

pricing.title: Upgrade to Plus
pricing.tablePlaceholder: Placeholder: pricing table ($1.99/mo, $4.99/qtr, $18.99/yr, $39.99 lifetime) + first-month promo + subscribe

common.supabaseEnvMissing: Supabase is not configured. Add `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL` and `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` to `.env.local`, then refresh.
